task_completion.description: Verify that Blue Sky Plan is open and the DICOM data from C:\workspace\data\SamplePatient is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blue Sky Plan interface is visible with a 3D/CT scan loaded (synthetic phantom dataset).

task_completion.description: Verify the export of the Panoramic View showing the full panoramic curve of the jaw.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or confirmation showing 'panoramic_view.png' being saved, or the file visible in the target directory, with a panoramic view visible in the software.

task_completion.description: Verify the export of the Axial View showing the teeth roots or alveolar ridge.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or confirmation showing 'axial_view.png' being saved, or the file visible in the target directory, with an axial view visible in the software.

task_completion.description: Verify the export of the 3D Rendering showing an oblique lateral view of the mandible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or confirmation showing '3d_rendering_view.png' being saved, or the file visible in the target directory, with a 3D rendering view visible in the software.

task_completion.description: Verify the export of the Cross-sectional View at the lower right first molar (Tooth #30) region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or confirmation showing 'cross_section_view.png' being saved, or the file visible in the target directory, with a cross-sectional view visible in the software.

task_completion.description: Verify that all four PNG files are saved in the correct destination folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File Explorer open to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CasePresentation showing the four required PNG files (panoramic_view.png, axial_view.png, 3d_rendering_view.png, cross_section_view.png).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Blue Sky Plan GUI to export the images rather than generating dummy files via terminal or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing interaction with Blue Sky Plan's export dialogs, menus, or screenshot tools.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually loaded and manipulated the DICOM data in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blue Sky Plan interface should display the actual loaded phantom dataset, not just an empty workspace or a static image viewer.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't just create empty files or text files renamed to .png.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands like 'touch' or text editor windows used to create the output files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The output directory must be C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CasePresentation. The expected files are panoramic_view.png, axial_view.png, 3d_rendering_view.png, and cross_section_view.png. The files must be at least 20KB in size. The DICOM data used is a synthetic phantom dataset ('DENTAL^PHANTOM') with 100 CT slices, not a real human patient.
